title: Opening for Store Manager at Evok International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Evok International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Evok International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!
